description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a long-sleeve pullover top and jogger-style pants. He wears a prominent patterned bandana or scarf covering his lower face and neck, adding a distinctive accessory to his look. His footwear consists of open-toe flip-flops, suggesting a relaxed or warm-weather setting. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and a fit build, with hands relaxed at his sides. The pants have visible cargo pockets, indicating a practical, streetwear-inspired style. The overall appearance is modern and suited for everyday city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a patterned bandana, jogger pants, and flip-flops, styled for an urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bandana covering the lower face, pullover top, jogger pants, and flip-flops.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the bandana's side profile, cargo pocket, and relaxed stance.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full coverage of the pullover and pants, with both arms visible at the sides.
description_view_3: Right three-quarter view emphasizing the bandana, facial profile, and the side seam of the jogger pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual pullover top, jogger pants with cargo pockets, patterned bandana or scarf
